fields.description:
## Context / Problem
Ruff ASYNC emits zero diagnostics across src/rebar. Ruff DTZ emits exactly three diagnostics: datetime.fromtimestamp() and datetime.strptime() in src/rebar/_engine_support/validate_checks.py, and date.today() in src/rebar/grounding/detectors/security_pin.py. The approved ratchet should land only after all three sites have explicit, tested timezone semantics.

## Approach
1. Create tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py as the owner of the shared Ruff configuration contract; 125d-ee6f-7af0-4200 depends on this story and extends that file later.
2. Define validation timestamp semantics as UTC. Integer epoch seconds are converted with datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(created, tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Persisted timestamp strings without an offset are interpreted as the event store's UTC wall time and assigned datetime.timezone.utc after parsing. Tests change the process TZ and prove the hourly cluster key is invariant.
3. Preserve security-rule cadence as a host-local calendar-date decision by replacing date.today() with datetime.datetime.now().astimezone().date(). Boundary tests cover age equal to cadence_days and age greater than cadence_days.
4. Add ASYNC and DTZ to the gated Ruff selection after the tests fail against current configuration.
5. Run the focused, default, and integration pytest tiers.

The spelling datetime.UTC is prohibited because Ruff target-version remains py310; use datetime.timezone.utc. Rejected: blanket DTZ ignores.

## Scope
- pyproject.toml
- tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py (required; created and owned by this story)
- src/rebar/_engine_support/validate_checks.py
- src/rebar/grounding/detectors/security_pin.py
- tests/unit/test_validate_idea_exemptions.py
- tests/unit/test_code_review_ws5.py

## Testing / Verification
- Configuration: pytest -q tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py
- Focused behavior: pytest -q tests/unit/test_validate_idea_exemptions.py tests/unit/test_code_review_ws5.py
- Ruff families: ruff check --select ASYNC,DTZ src/rebar tests
- Canonical lint: make lint
- Default tier: pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q
- Integration tier: pytest -m integration -q

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py exists and asserts ASYNC and DTZ are selected by the global Ruff configuration.
- [ ] ruff check --select ASYNC,DTZ src/rebar tests exits 0.
- [ ] tests prove integer epoch timestamps produce the same UTC hour cluster under at least two distinct process TZ settings.
- [ ] tests prove timezone-less persisted timestamp strings are interpreted as UTC.
- [ ] implementation uses datetime.timezone.utc and contains no datetime.UTC reference.
- [ ] security-pin tests prove age_days == cadence_days is not stale.
- [ ] security-pin tests prove age_days > cadence_days is stale.
- [ ] pytest -q tests/unit/test_validate_idea_exemptions.py tests/unit/test_code_review_ws5.py exits 0.
- [ ] make lint exits 0.
- [ ] pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q exits 0.
- [ ] pytest -m integration -q exits 0.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py asserts the exact Ruff security selector S is absent and no Semgrep configuration is introduced by this story.
